ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_address" TEXT /* Address of the district */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_groups" (
  "testing_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing group */,
  "testing_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Subject ID of the subject being assessed */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Grade ID of the grade level of the assessment */,
  "testing_group_id" INTEGER /* Testing group ID of the testing group the student belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* School ID of the school the student attends */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* District ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* School year during which the assessment was conducted */,
  "state_percent_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students proficient at the state level */,
  "district_percent_students_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students proficient at the district level */,
  "school_percent_students_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students proficient at the school level */,
  "percent_advanced" REAL /* Percentage of students performing at the advanced level */,
  "percent_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students performing at the proficient level */,
  "percent_partially_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students performing at the partially proficient level */,
  "percent_not_proficient" REAL /* Percentage of students not proficient */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Score the student received on the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_testing_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_group_id") REFERENCES testing_groups ("testing_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher evaluation */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Teacher ID of the teacher being evaluated */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* School ID of the school the teacher teaches at */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score the teacher received on the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_evaluations_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_evaluations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
